sn1.16:1.1: v.30"Drowsiness, lethargy, lazy stretching,Discontent, torpor after meals:Because of this, here among beings,The noble path does not appear."
sn1.16:2.1: v.31"Drowsiness, lethargy, lazy stretching,Discontent, torpor after meals:When one dispels this with energy,The noble path is cleared."
